name: 5ive-blackjack
description: Single-player blackjack on 5IVE VM (mock chips MVP)

scripts.test:onchain:mainnet: node -e "console.error('Mainnet on-chain test flow is disabled for this project.'); process.exit(1);"
scripts.test:onchain:mainnet:preflight: node -e "console.error('Mainnet preflight test flow is disabled for this project.'); process.exit(1);"
scripts.client:build: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.client:run: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run run
scripts.client:test:localnet: npm run build && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run test:localnet
scripts.client:test:journey:localnet: npm run build && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run test:journey:localnet
scripts.client:journey:localnet: npm run build && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run journey:localnet
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:onchain:local && npm run client:run:local
scripts.verify:networks: npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:onchain:local && npm run test:onchain:devnet
scripts.smoke: npm run build && npm run test
scripts.smoke:onchain:local: npm run build && npm run test:onchain:local
